evidence.description: CRIT-S5-004 passThreshold rewritten with 4 enumerated assertions matching feedReducer.sprint5.test.ts test bodies
All 4 tests contain the expect() lines named in CRIT-S5-004 passThreshold including pendingNextFocus.toBeNull()
Negotiated trade-offs §1 explicitly defers REQ-FEED-029 AC (2) focus and AC (3) +page.svelte single-call to Sprint 6 / note-body-editor
3 new cargo tests cover dot-file exclusion, symlink exclusion (cfg(unix)), and subdirectory non-recursion
CRIT-S5-005 passThreshold names 3 cargo test functions and 3 grep patterns explicitly
scan_vault_feed now filters dot-files via file_name().starts_with('.') and non-regular files via file_type().is_ok_and(|ft| ft.is_file()); case-insensitive .md check retained at line 421
compose_initial_snapshot_with_autocreate is pure: takes only Vec<String>, HashMap, and i64; no I/O, no SystemTime, no fs
CRIT-S5-007 reworded: 'atomic' removed; replaced with pure-function framing and concrete (a)(b)(c) assertions
artifactsTouched (Sprint 5 functional scope) and styleOnlyRefactorFootprint (clippy/fmt-only) are now structurally separated; gating criteria do not reference styleOnlyRefactorFootprint
Negotiated trade-offs §5 documents the style-only rationale and proposes a separate tech-debt bd task for crate-wide clippy strict-mode migration
CRIT-S5-002 / CRIT-S5-003 name 5 cargo tests (incl. proptest) for PROP-FEED-S5-001/002/003/005 — all binary-evaluable
format_base_id and next_available_note_id are pure (no SystemTime, no fs, no rand); purity boundary matches verification-architecture.md:700
Quality gate results: clippy 0 warnings, fmt 0 diff, cargo test 160 PASS, bun test 1813 PASS
